entry.title: New: BILL044(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO TRAFFIC SAFETY.

Authorizes the Director of Transportation Services to post a recommended safe speed on roadways near schools. Lowers the maximum speed on roadways in public parks and public school grounds from 25 to 20 miles per hour. Creates a new 20 miles per hour speed limit zone applicable to certain roadways, including roadways bordering school grounds during certain days and times.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
